title: gerbera nepalensis
intro: Gerbera nepalensis, also known as the Himalayan gerbera, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gerbera nepalensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried to make herbal supplements.
